subject: Prevent recurrence of the code-index daemon wedge: a PID-alive-but-socket-dead daemon that the launcher does not reclaim, causing MCP reconnect -32000
incident: code-index daemon crashed uncleanly: 2 orphaned processes alive at 0% CPU, IPC socket /tmp/mk-code-index/daemon-ipc.sock never (re)created, lease file gone from an empty socket dir, 17MB orphaned WAL with no holder, DB integrity ok. /mcp reconnect returned -32000. Manual fix: kill orphans + wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) + clean socket dir.
